title: Marble Mortar and Pestle Set, Pill Crusher and Spice Stone Grinder, 3.7 Inch, 1/2 Cup, Grinding is Efficient and Labor-Saving (Black)
description:
About this item
[EFFICIENT] The mushroom-shaped pestle has more contact surfaces with the mortar, so it can finish the grinding work faster than the ordinary pestle and mortar.
[EFFORTLESS] Hold the sleek handle, just use a small force to rotate around the circle to grind, and the ingredients will not overflow. A silicone pad is attached to the bottom to protect the countertop and non-slip.
[APPLICATION] This stone grinder can easily grind pills, spices, and herbs into fine powder. It is a must-have kitchen tool for the family.
[MATERIAL SIZE] It is made of natural marble, with exquisite texture, smooth surface, 3.7 inches, 1/2 cup, beautiful and compact, and can also be used as a kitchen decoration.
[EXPLANATION] Since it is natural stone, each product has a different color and pattern. In order to obtain a better grinding effect, the inner cavity retains roughness. Please wash with water several times before use.
reviews_5s:
I have to crush two pills for my dog every meal, one is larger than a quarter And the other is a normal pill size but also thick. I was using my fingers to break them up before and then when that couldn't get it small enough. I was using scissors to cut it down. I tried putting them in a plastic bag and smashing them with the hammer, I tried a different screw down pill crusher. Nothing worked very well, this thing works like a charm and gets the job done very quickly. Since this is the only thing I use it for, I'm not worried about the pills or the leftover dust getting impregnated into anything else and it works really well and crushes everything down very very quickly and easily. I strongly recommend this to anybody who asked you to crush pills more than once a day.I liked the size of the pestle and the concept of the bowl shaped mortar which is supposed to be easier to use.

I mainly purchased it to crush whole peppercorns, however, peppercorns are probably the only thing it won’t crush. Because they are round, they act like ball bearings against the pestle and the pestle just rolls around on them.

Nevertheless, the mortar and pestle are very nice, weighty, decent size for small portion grinding, and it’s made of nice material.What a difference this made. My poor kitty needs cancer meds. Shoving those pills in his throat, no matter the pills size, is horrible - for him and me. Many pills are bitter. Getting pills compounded is very expensive, too.
Now I use this set, add the fine powder to tuna water or goat's milk, and use a 1 ml syringe to give him his meds. It has been a stress saver for both of us. Rather than flinching when I come near him twice a day with the bag of meds, he is okay with all now.
I wish the manufacturer would add a brush (as other sellers do) and at least a brief pamphlet of instructions (how to best wash), and what the materials are. Nothing included.
Great design, fabulous results, nice safe packaging.With a few rolls, a hard rock-like pill is crushed without effort. This is perfect. High quality. Love itGood qualityThis mortar and pestle is the perfect size for my small kitchen. Easy to use. Simply apply pressure and rotate the pestle to grind or crush. Cleans easily.This is the only pill crusher you need. We’ve had 2 others one manual which promptly broke and one electric which promptly Jammed. Don’t waste your money or time on the others. This on is the Very Best.Produces very high quality grinds. Large surface area makes grinding a breeze..AwesomePurchased this for my mom. It's easy for her to use since she has arthritis in her hands and wrists. She's able to pulverise medication tablets to administer easily.
reviews_1s:
The handle is too small to grip and apply pressure. Since the pressure is distributed over a large area, it doesn’t work well.

Tried to grind fennel and anise seeds and it was very difficult.

Ended up getting an electric grinder and tossing this one in the trash.I have only used it a couple of times and found a large crack as pictured. I am using this to crush my medication for my horse and found a large portion stuck to the bottom of the mortar and pestle. I am not one to leave reviews but feel that this is a waste of money. Not a quality product.Super bummed it came used, will be returning it.Broke the first time I used it. It's for looks only. Not for real use.Arrived broken. Probably happened during shipment and was no issue getting a refund.What did i dislike? How bout the flippin crack in the bowlIt was broken when I received it! So disappointed!!!!Highly disappointed, definitely returning. Not worth $30.It doesn’t grind well
